title: Sky Royal
description:
Welcome to Sky Royal, An Ultimate Battle Royal Experience!

Have you ever wanted to play a royal with your friends? Well, this datapack allows you to!
body:
## Welcome to Sky Royal, An Ultimate Battle Royal Experience!

Have you ever wanted to play a royal with your friends? Well, this datapack allows you to!
This datapack has custom crafts, world generation, loot tables, and more!

Frozen Horizon update has been released!

Type /function rfi:startroyal to play a sky royal with your friends!

Features:

- There is a world border that will be closing in slowly for a better pvp experience!
- There are loot creates that drop from the sky at 0 0 every 10 minutes, the timer is displayed on the bottom part of your screen.
- Shield crafts have been disabled for a better sword pvp experience!
- PVP starts instantly
- Ancient cities are more common
- Fishing loot tables have been improved, fishing treasure is more common, and you can now get diamonds, golden apples, and other good stuff!
- Village loot tables are also improved, they give you diamonds, more emeralds, and other items
- Custom traders that spawn randomly around the world and accept gold for items like diamonds
- Always day time, and the weather is always clear
- Custom items
- Custom world gen
- And even more features!

Crafts:

- [Planet Minecraft Link](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/sky-royal/)

License:

- You may not redistribute this project
- You may not change files or code in this project
- You may use in YouTube videos as long as you use some form of credit
- You may not use in public servers

Credits:
- Sharingan for the idea of the potion of levitation
- Aeris2004 for being a game tester

Discord:

Join the discord for notifications of updates, and for help with any issues in the datapack. [Discord Link](https://discord.gg/HhrTBNp9K2)

How long can you survive?

If you find any bugs, please tell me in then the Discord above, for a better experience in Sky Royal.
Let me know of any of your ideas, for a chance of them being added!
